libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not add external services or extra Maven dependencies. Build coverage around WebClient talking to a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1, covering GET/POST, headers, JSON/body codecs, forms or multipart, redirects/cookies/session/cache as appropriate. Ensure native test execution for the 5.0.x Vert.x/Netty stack sets: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 scaffold only applies the Netty system properties when libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; the 5.0.1 run can miss them unless the condition is widened or equivalent native runtime args are set.
Multipart/file-stream tests exercise asynchronous Netty/Vert.x paths and can expose native-only timing or access issues; local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; meaningful tests can use the transitive Vert.x core HTTP server locally, but Java 25 native-image runs need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for 5.0.0.
